case_title: THE BONEYARD, LLC. VS. BUSINESS CAPITAL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,480.81 FILED BY THE BONEYARD, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT BUSINESS CAPITAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BONEYARD, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT BUSINESS CAPITAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUSINESS CAPITAL
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 6-19-19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
